# Context Engineering

The discipline of structuring information so AI systems produce what you actually want.

## Core Principle

Every AI interaction requires context. The question is who controls it, how it's structured, and whether it compounds as an asset.

## Key Insight

Written language is now code. Anyone who can write clear prose can create programs.
